---
title: "Contact"
---

The best way to reach me is via my personal email.

## Email

- [alex.frederick.ross@gmail.com](mailto:alex.frederick.ross@gmail.com) **(preferred)**
- [alexander-frederick.ross.1@ulaval.ca](mailto:alexander-frederick.ross.1@ulaval.ca) (Université Laval)
- [aross005@ucr.edu](mailto:aross005@ucr.edu) (UC Riverside)

---

## Connect

- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=n7m5UVcAAAAJ&hl=en)
- [Twitter/X](https://twitter.com/aross005)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/aross005)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/alexander-ross-bb9360158/)
